title: galeopsis × fragrans
intro: Galeopsis × fragrans is a hybrid plant, also known as Fragrant Hemp-nettle, which is a cross between Galeopsis ladanum and Galeopsis tetrahit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galeopsis × fragrans include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Galeopsis × fragrans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
